title: Slovakian Tofu Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish with a twist, featuring pan-seared tofu and homemade dumplings.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, paprika, and caraway seeds.
Gradually add water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly.
Pan-fry the dumplings in a little oil until golden brown.
In a separate pan, cook the tofu with savory sauce until golden brown.
Add tangy sour cream and garlic to the tofu and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Serve the tofu with homemade dumplings and enjoy!
